* [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=31P4DgkW9Ns The Wuxi Finger Hold]
* [https://qr.ae/pN28mq Eric discusses Kung Fu Panda on Quora]
{{#widget:Tweet|id=1195506711290736645}}

== See Also ==

* [[Genius vs Excellence]]
* [[Kung Fu Panda]]
* [[There is no secret ingredient]]
* [[The War on Excellence]]

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Education]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
